caption.full:
Doctor Who director Jamie Magnus Stone is writing AI films

Jamie Magnus Stone and Micho Rutare are penning screenplays for AI-enabled films from Promise AI. Stone, who directed episodes of Doctor Who, is working on a story about scientists in a bunker, while Rutare, known for Sharknado, is developing an animated feature set in futuristic Los Angeles.

Do you think AI can make movies as fun as Sharknado?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #AI #JamieMagnusStone #MichoRutare
caption.firstComment: Would you watch a Doctor Who-style adventure made by AI, or should the humans keep the creative control?

facebook.text: Doctor Who director Jamie Magnus Stone and Sharknado producer Micho Rutare are writing new screenplays for AI films at Promise AI. Stone is developing 'Everything is Within Tolerance,' about scientists in a bunker, while Rutare is creating the animated feature 'Ninja Punk.' Each writer will collaborate with an AI-native creator on their projects. What do you think of AI in filmmaking? Let us know below!

youtube.title: Jamie Magnus Stone: Doctor Who Director Writes AI Films
youtube.description:
Doctor Who director Jamie Magnus Stone and Sharknado producer Micho Rutare are writing screenplays for AI-enabled films at Promise AI. Stone is developing Everything is Within Tolerance, while Rutare is creating Ninja Punk. Tyler Mitchell noted AI filmmakers have 'mastery that very few people have.'

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

Watch more: https://thescreenreport.com/movies/doctor-who-director-sharknado-producer-write-ai-films-for-startup-promise-a/
